description: A featured news block displaying a grid of news cards with one prominent main feature and several secondary cards, optionally preceded by a section heading and followed by a view-all link.

props.name: featuredCard
props.type: { href: string; ariaLabel: string; imageSrc: string; imageAlt: string; title: string; description?: string; date: string; dateTime: string; newsSource?: string; }

props.name: secondaryCards
props.type: Array<{ href: string; ariaLabel: string; imageSrc: string; imageAlt: string; title: string; description?: string; date: string; dateTime: string; newsSource?: string; }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Featured news block in 'para' mode with a section heading and three secondary cards

featuredCard.ariaLabel: School of English linguist recognised with international TESOL research award
featuredCard.title: School of English linguist recognised with international TESOL research award
featuredCard.description: Dr Beatriz Gonzalez-Fernandez has received the TESOL Award for Excellence in Research, recognising her internationally significant contributions to understanding how additional languages are learned and used.

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: Multispecies Mutualisms project launches with interdisciplinary workshop at Sheffield
secondaryCards.imageAlt: Four people stood smiling for the camera
secondaryCards.title: Multispecies Mutualisms project launches with interdisciplinary workshop at Sheffield
secondaryCards.description: A new Wellcome-funded research project exploring the complex relationships between humans and other species has launched at the University of Sheffield.

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: Ey up, AI! Landmark study helps AI better understand accents and dialects
secondaryCards.imageAlt: A close up shot of a man in a suit holding his phone
secondaryCards.title: Ey up, AI! Landmark study helps AI better understand accents and dialects
secondaryCards.description: AI could soon better understand people's accent and dialect, thanks to a landmark study being led by the University of Sheffield.

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: Report led by Prof. Joanna Gavins discovers language barrier stalling UK sustainability efforts
secondaryCards.imageAlt: a large pile of crushed up water bottles
secondaryCards.title: Report led by Prof. Joanna Gavins discovers language barrier stalling UK sustainability efforts
secondaryCards.description: A new study led by Professor Joanna Gavins has discovered that failures in language and communication are undermining progress.

stories.name: RecentMode
stories.description: Featured news block in 'recent' mode without a section heading or view-all link

featuredCard.ariaLabel: University of Sheffield to lead £12.5m national centre for next-generation semiconductor systems
featuredCard.title: University of Sheffield to lead £12.5m national centre for next-generation semiconductor systems
featuredCard.description: The University of Sheffield is leading a new £12.5 million national research centre to strengthen the UK's ability to design the next generation of advanced electronic systems.

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: Advanced virtual simulations set to reshape care for patients with multiple long-term conditions
secondaryCards.imageAlt: Man struggling with a long term health condition
secondaryCards.title: Advanced virtual simulations set to reshape care for patients with multiple long-term conditions

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: Watch a home built in 10 days as Sheffield's factory-in-a-box demonstrates a solution
secondaryCards.title: Watch a home built in 10 days as Sheffield's 'factory-in-a-box' demonstrates a solution to the housing crisis

secondaryCards.ariaLabel: University of Sheffield appoints Chair of Fusion Technology
secondaryCards.title: University of Sheffield appoints Chair of Fusion Technology

notes: The root div takes either 'para' or 'recent' as an additional class alongside 'featured-news'. In 'para' mode an optional h2.field-multi-title heading and a .featured-news-view-all-link may appear. The main featured card uses .newscard.mainfeat and renders its title in an h2; secondary cards use .newscard and render their title in h3. Each card is wrapped in an anchor tag with aria-label. The .bottomrow contains a .news-date span (NewsDate atom imported from childComponents) and a .link-arrow/.ncarrow arrow icon (fas fa-sm fa-arrow-right). An optional .news-src span can appear within .card-content. The views-element-container is a Drupal wrapper div that wraps all news cards.
